## Commands and CLI usage

Run `npm install` to set up dependencies <!-- âś… -->
Use `git status` to check your branch <!-- âś… -->
Start the server with `yarn dev` <!-- âś… -->
Enable execution using `chmod +x deploy.sh` <!-- âś… -->

## Functions and code snippets

Call `fetchUserData(token)` to retrieve the user object <!-- âś… -->
Use `Array.prototype.map()` for transformation <!-- âś… -->
The method `toISOString()` returns a UTC string <!-- âś… -->
Use `console.log()` to debug the response <!-- âś… -->
Wrap it in `Promise.all()` to run in parallel <!-- âś… -->

## Inline literals and expressions

Set the `NODE_ENV` variable to `production` <!-- âś… -->
Update your path with `export PATH="$PATH:/usr/local/bin"` <!-- âś… -->
Set the `PATH` variable to `/usr/local/bin` <!-- âś… -->
Set the `HOME` variable to `/home/user` <!-- âś… -->
The regex `/^[a-z0-9-]+$/` matches kebab-case strings <!-- âś… -->
Reference the `type: module` setting in `package.json` <!-- âś… -->
Use `#define PI 3.14` in your header file <!-- âś… -->

## Math and formulas

Use the formula `a^2 + b^2 = c^2` for right triangles <!-- âś… -->
`E = mc^2` describes the relationship between energy and mass <!-- âś… -->
The sigmoid function is `1 / (1 + e^-x)` <!-- âś… -->

## HTML semantic code tags should not trigger BCE001

Press <kbd>Ctrl+C</kbd> to copy. <!-- âś… -->
The <code>NODE_ENV</code> variable controls the environment. <!-- âś… -->
Use <samp>error_output</samp> to check the result. <!-- âś… -->
The <var>user_name</var> parameter is required. <!-- âś… -->

## Pure alphabetic slash-separated words should not be flagged as paths

Organize by features/options/settings in the configuration. <!-- âś… -->
The models/views/controllers pattern is common in MVC. <!-- âś… -->
Support create/update/delete operations on resources. <!-- âś… -->

## Bracket placeholders should not be flagged

Use [some_variable] as a placeholder in templates. <!-- âś… -->
The [user_name] field is required in the config. <!-- âś… -->
See [api_key] in the settings panel. <!-- âś… -->
